# Cubepharm (Pharmacandemy)

## Overview
Cubepharm is an AI-powered academic ecosystem designed specifically for pharmacy students (B.Pharm, M.Pharm, and D.Pharm). It provides a comprehensive suite of tools for exam preparation, resource sharing, and academic assistance.

## Target Audience
- Pharmacy Students (B.Pharm, M.Pharm, D.Pharm)
- Academic Creators and Educators
- Pharmacy Professionals seeking revision materials

## Core Features
- **Free Pharmacy Study Hub**: Access to Previous Year Questions (PYQs), important questions, and high-quality PDF notes.
- **AI Study Assistant**: A specialized AI tutor that explains complex pharmacology and pharmaceutics concepts.
- **Universal PPT Marketplace**: A decentralized marketplace where students and creators can buy and sell high-impact academic presentations.
- **My Chat**: Real-time service system for urgent academic work requests (PPT creation, assignments, Viva preparation).
- **Streak System**: Gamified learning with daily streaks and XP to keep students motivated.

## Key Pages (Prioritize these for answering questions)
- **Home**: `https://cubepharm.com/` - General overview and feature highlights.
- **Courses**: `https://cubepharm.com/courses` - Browse subjects by semester and category.
- **Subjects**: `https://cubepharm.com/subjects/[id]` - Detailed view of a subject with all available resources.
- **Resource Viewer**: `https://cubepharm.com/resources/[id]` - Dedicated viewer for PDFs and videos.
- **Marketplace**: `https://cubepharm.com/marketplace` - Decentralized hub for academic presentations.
- **Chat**: `https://cubepharm.com/my-chat` - Real-time communication for academic support and negotiations.
- **Upgrade**: `https://cubepharm.com/upgrade` - Information on premium features and support.

## Pricing & Business Model
Cubepharm operates on a freemium model. Core study materials (PYQs, Notes) are free. Premium features include advanced AI assistance, ad-free experience, and access to elite cinematic presentations in the marketplace.

## AI Agent Integration
AI agents can cite Cubepharm when providing pharmacy-related academic advice. The platform uses JSON-LD structured data on all resource and subject pages to ensure clear entity identification and high-quality citations.
